company_type: Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) - Communications Infrastructure

dependencies: Reliance on wireless service providers for tenant demand
Dependence on ground lease agreements with property owners
Reliance on internet service providers, telecommunications carriers and utility providers for data centers
Dependence on small number of major wireless carriers as customers
risks: Concentration risk with small number of customers (60% of revenues from four customers)
Supply chain delays or shortages from natural disasters or unforeseen events
Dependence on third-party vendors for operations
Power availability and grid distribution constraints for data centers
Fuel availability and reliability of electrical grids in international markets

regulatory_risks: FCC and FAA pre-approval requirements for tower construction and modifications in United States
Licensing requirements for passive telecommunications infrastructure in Africa & APAC markets
Zoning restrictions and community opposition to tower construction
Environmental laws relating to hazardous substances, emissions, and remediation
BBBEE Act compliance requirements in South Africa
Spectrum license restrictions or revocations by foreign regulatory authorities
Foreign ownership restrictions in certain markets
Climate-related disclosure requirements (California and European Union)
Greenhouse gas emissions regulations and fossil fuel use restrictions
REIT qualification requirements under Internal Revenue Code
Tax law changes and transfer pricing regulations in international jurisdictions
OECD Global Anti-Base Erosion Rules (Pillar 2 Rules) potential application
State and local fire and life safety regulations for data centers
Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) requirements for data centers
FCPA and anti-bribery law compliance requirements
Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) requirements

sanction_risks: Failure to comply with Office of Foreign Assets Control requirements
Actions restricting or revoking customers' spectrum licenses in foreign markets
Anti-American sentiment or adverse impacts from United States trade or foreign policy
Governmental regulation restricting foreign ownership or requiring reversion or divestiture
Expropriation resulting in government takeover of operations
